prompt: Ultra-realistic smartphone selfie taken with a mobile phone at night, looks genuinely captured on an iPhone/mobile camera, not a DSLR. A beautiful young East Asian woman with long, slightly messy dark brown hair flowing naturally in the breeze, fair porcelain skin, large expressive brown eyes, soft natural makeup, subtle blush, and glossy pink lips making a cute duck-face expression. Wearing a fitted gray spaghetti-strap camisole, holding a smartphone casually in one hand while walking along a quiet tree-lined city sidewalk at night. Warm streetlights illuminate her face with soft shadows, parked cars, green trees, and an empty road in the background. Slight handheld motion blur, natural phone HDR, realistic skin texture, authentic hair strands, mild digital noise, front-camera perspective, candid lifestyle aesthetic, casual late-night walk, Instagram-style selfie, high detail, photorealistic, clearly looks like an unedited mobile phone photo, not AI or studio photography.

promptZh: 由手机在夜间拍摄的超逼真手机自拍，看起来就像是用 iPhone 或手机摄像头真实捕捉的，而非单反相机。一位美丽的 年轻东亚女性，留着深棕色长发，在微风中自然飘动，有着白皙如瓷的肌肤、明亮动人的棕色大眼睛、清透自然的妆容、淡淡的腮红和水润的粉色嘴唇，正对着镜头嘟嘴卖萌。身穿 修身灰色吊带背心，一手随意拿着手机，走在夜间的 安静的林荫城市人行道 上。温暖的街灯照亮了她的脸庞，投下柔和的阴影，背景是停放的车辆、绿树和空旷的街道。带有轻微的手持运动模糊，自然的手机 HDR 效果，真实的皮肤纹理，逼真的发丝细节，轻微的数码噪点，前置摄像头视角，随性的生活方式美学，休闲的深夜漫步，Instagram 风格自拍，高细节，照片级真实感，看起来就像未经修饰的手机照片，而非 AI 或摄影棚作品。
